query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "claw-swe-bench: a benchmark for evaluating openclaw-style agent harnes" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it directly measures the same domain (SWE-Bench agent performance) and the same underlying mechanism (the reliability of test-based evaluation metrics) that the user's question about "Claw-SWE-Bench" and agent harnesses investigates. It provides the necessary empirical baseline and critical context regarding inflated success rates that any literature review on SWE-Bench evaluation frameworks must cite.
